What I've Built

Projects

01
Multiplayer Math Quiz Game
MAR 2025
A real-time multiplayer math game where users compete solving math problems simultaneously. Built with WebSockets for smooth, synchronized gameplay including player authentication, live score tracking, and dynamic question generation.
Node.js Socket.IO JavaScript WebSockets
02
File Permission Changer App
APR 2025
A secure Java tool to modify read, write, and execute permissions of files and directories. Leverages Java I/O and NIO libraries for file attribute management, with an intuitive GUI/CLI interface and robust error handling.
Java Java I/O NIO GUI
